+25 to maximum Life per Allocated Journey Tattoo of the Body

Items.Item: Rarity: UNIQUE The Golden Charlatan Lion Sword Unique ID: a30ab7bed52b24af33afa4251897343524709cc07189229cf731ea823a50c2c2 Item Level: 87 Quality: 20 Sockets: B-B-W-W-W-G LevelReq: 65 Implicits: 3 {crafted}Quality does not increase Physical Damage {crafted}Grants 1% increased Area of Effect per 4% Quality +50 to Strength and Dexterity +200 Intelligence Requirement 285% increased Physical Damage 16% increased Attack Speed 186% increased Critical Strike Chance Critical Strikes with this Weapon do not deal extra Damage Gain a random Shrine Buff for 30 seconds when you Kill a Rare or Unique Enemy +1 to maximum Mana per 2 Intelligence
